svg.title: AWS to Azure + Databricks skill mapping
svg.desc: A side-by-side mapping of AWS data engineering skills to their Azure and Databricks equivalents, plus an updated ML/AI learning path.

g.onclick: sendPrompt('How does Azure Data Lake Storage differ from S3? What should I know as an AWS engineer?')
sendPrompt('How does Azure Data Lake Storage differ from S3? What should I know as an AWS engineer?')
sendPrompt('How does Databricks compare to AWS Glue + EMR? What are the key differences?')
sendPrompt('How does Databricks compare to AWS Glue + EMR? What are the key differences?')
sendPrompt('How does Azure Data Factory compare to AWS Step Functions and MWAA?')
sendPrompt('How does Azure Data Factory compare to AWS Step Functions and MWAA?')
sendPrompt('How does Azure Synapse Analytics or Databricks SQL compare to AWS Redshift?')
sendPrompt('How does Azure Synapse Analytics or Databricks SQL compare to AWS Redshift?')
sendPrompt('How does Azure ML and Databricks MLflow compare to AWS SageMaker?')
sendPrompt('How does Azure ML and Databricks MLflow compare to AWS SageMaker?')
sendPrompt('How does Azure OpenAI Service compare to AWS Bedrock for building GenAI applications?')
sendPrompt('How does Azure OpenAI Service compare to AWS Bedrock for building GenAI applications?')

svg.text: Updated ML/AI path for Databricks + Azure

g.onclick: sendPrompt('Give me a 2-week crash course plan to get productive in Databricks as an AWS data engineer')
g.text: Priority 1 — Databricks fundamentals (do this first, 2 weeks)
Lakehouse architecture, Delta Lake, Unity Catalog, Databricks notebooks

g.onclick: sendPrompt('What Azure services should an AWS data engineer learn first? Give me a focused 2-week plan.')
g.text: ADLS Gen2, Azure ML, ADF pipelines, Azure DevOps

g.onclick: sendPrompt('How do I build ML models using Databricks MLflow and Azure ML? Give me a practical project plan.')
g.text: Priority 3 — ML on Databricks (weeks 3–8, same ML roadmap)
Spark MLlib, MLflow tracking, Feature Store, AutoML

g.onclick: sendPrompt('How do I build AI agents and RAG pipelines using Azure OpenAI and Databricks? Give me a project plan.')
g.text: Priority 4 — GenAI & agents (weeks 9–20, same as before)
Azure OpenAI + LangChain, RAG on Delta, Databricks AI agents

g.onclick: sendPrompt('What certifications should I target for Databricks and Azure as an ML-focused data engineer?')
g.text: Target certs: Databricks Certified Associate + Azure DP-203 + Azure AI-102
